mapper.select:
select distinct r.role_id, r.role_name, r.role_sort, r.create_time from role r left join user_role ur on ur.role_id = r.role_id left join user u on u.user_id = ur.user_id
AND r.role_id = #{roleId}
AND r.role_name like concat('%', #{roleName}, '%')
order by r.role_sort
select distinct r.role_id, r.role_name, r.role_sort, r.create_time from role r left join user_role ur on ur.role_id = r.role_id left join user u on u.user_id = ur.user_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}
select distinct r.role_id, r.role_name, r.role_sort, r.create_time from role r left join user_role ur on ur.role_id = r.role_id left join user u on u.user_id = ur.user_id
select r.role_id from role r left join user_role ur on ur.role_id = r.role_id left join user u on u.user_id = ur.user_id where u.user_id = #{userId}
select distinct r.role_id, r.role_name, r.role_sort, r.create_time from role r left join user_role ur on ur.role_id = r.role_id left join user u on u.user_id = ur.user_id where r.role_id = #{roleId}

select distinct r.role_id, r.role_name, r.role_sort, r.create_time from role r left join user_role ur on ur.role_id = r.role_id left join user u on u.user_id = ur.user_id WHERE u.user_name = #{userName}
mapper.insert: insert into role( role_id, role_name, role_sort, create_time )values( #{roleId}, #{roleName}, #{roleSort}, sysdate() )
mapper.delete:
delete from role where role_id in
#{roleId}
